description: PLAN_61 Wave A / Task 2 (defects D14, D18). Static-scan containment of the legacy fabricated-number forecast lane. Prevents NEW production consumers from importing the contained Cohort/ProjectedMetrics engines (directly, via @/ @shared/ @server/ or relative specifiers, via literal dynamic import(), via a protected-symbol import from the re-exporting barrel, or via the MetricsAggregator facade). Direct static scanning only: no transitive graph, no runtime tagging. Authoritative reserve snapshot is the hardcoded-multiplier ReserveEngine (ADR-056); the engines contained here are the forecast lane the program replaces with current_forecast_v2.
scopeDecision: The analysis-cohort pipeline exports of client/src/core/cohorts/index.ts (analyzeCohorts, resolvers, XIRR/DPI/TVPI metrics, cash-flow helpers) are OUT of containment. Only the three engine symbols (CohortEngine, generateCohortSummary, compareCohorts) plus the ProjectedMetricsCalculator class are protected. compareCohorts is matched ONLY when it resolves to the cohorts/CohortEngine module — the unrelated compareCohorts sort comparator in shared/core/capitalAllocation is NOT protected.

allowedConsumers.note: The contained PMC engine itself; replaced by current_forecast_v2.
Facade wrapping PMC; its dual-forecast path migrates to v2.

Fixtures-only demo route, explicitly NOT fund-scoped (engine-summaries.ts:159); pure synthetic compute. Cannot prove V2 use and MUST NOT gate activation. First candidate for the follow-up destructive-cleanup plan.
Pure re-export shim of the shared engine. Sunset with the demo cohort surface.
Re-exporting barrel; currently zero downstream importers. Protected-symbol re-export allowed here so the barrel is itself the allowlisted boundary.
getUnifiedMetrics current-forecast surface — migrates to current_forecast_v2.
Calls metricsAggregator.invalidateCache; follows the facade to v2.
